zh.lifeSummary: 當Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie於1270年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利時，她的父親David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl25歲，母親Isabelle De Dover of Chilham23歲。她和Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1320年享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie于1270年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利时，她的父亲David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl25岁，母亲Isabelle De Dover of Chilham23岁。她和Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1320年享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Annabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabell
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

en.lifeSummary: When Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie was born in 1270, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl, was 25 and her mother, Isabelle De Dover of Chilham, was 23. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon. She died in 1320, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie est née en 1270, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabelle De Dover of Chilham, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon. Elle est décédée en 1320, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie 1270 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl 25 und ihre Mutter Isabelle De Dover of Chilham 23. Sie hatte mit Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1320 im Alter von 50 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie è nata il nel 1270 nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Isabelle De Dover of Chilham, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon. Morì nel 1320, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogieが1270年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで生まれた時，父David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Athollは25歳，母Isabelle De Dover of Chilhamは23歳であった。彼女はSir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1320年に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie(이)가 1270년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle De Dover of Chilham(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1320년 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie nasceu em 1270, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle De Dover of Chilham, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon. Ela faleceu em 1320, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie родилась в 1270 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle De Dover of Chilham, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon. Она умерла в 1320 г. в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie nació en 1270, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabelle De Dover of Chilham, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon. Murió en 1320, a la edad de 50 años.
